since_last: 69% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +7.02%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC -4.23% · Gold -3.01% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 69% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +7.02%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +7.02%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.32%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +12.86%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +12.86%, LSCC +10.97%, SMCI +10.84%, INTC +10.68%, KLAC +9.54%. Laggards: INOD -7.16%, SPCX -5.04%, IBM -4.59%, WDAY -3.80%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.04% at $182.16
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.04% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
